steps.t: Lyndelby is hidden in the mountains west of Misthallow. You should explore Lyndelby and see if any of the Holbytlan will greet you.
Lyndelby is hidden in the mountains west of Misthallow. You should explore Lyndelby and see if any of the Holbytlan will greet you.
Lyndelby is hidden in the mountains west of Misthallow. You should talk to Madelgard Túcca in Lyndelby.

Madelgard Túcca can be found in Lyndelby. You should talk to Madelgard Túcca.
